nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn was born in 1282, in Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, England. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1312, in Pershore, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn est né en 1282, à Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1312, à Pershore, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn wurde 1282 in Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1312 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Pershore, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn è nato il nel 1282 nel Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1312, nel Pershore, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Perton, Pershore, Wocestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアペルショア
ja.Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチップイング ノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelynは1282年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチップイング ノートンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1312年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアペルショアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn(은)는 1282년 영국 스퍼드실르 치핀그 노르턴에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 영국 워스스터실르 퍼쇼어에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn nasceu em 1282, em Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1312, em Pershore, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn родился в 1282 г. в местности чиппинг нортон, оксфордшир, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1312 г. в местности пиршаур, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Chastelyn nació en 1282, en Chipping Norton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1312, en Pershore, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
